title: Just Enough Null
description: A fanmod of The Broken Script that adds a Null Biome, Null Blocks and more!
body:
### Try to survive _this._
![Null biome, all black.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23a1caa2568d6ad5023d099ee79ade92b6ced09d_0.webp)
## The darkest nights, for the strongest knights.
JustEnoughNull is a mod inspired by the "null" creepypasta and [The Broken Script mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script).

![Null biome in midnight.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dafbc1870192bd94d62d7a2402d7094a608482dc_0.webp)
This mod includes a lot of custom items, like null tools, null wood and even a null biome. It also includes an entity you can talk to, but do NOT annoy him. Seriously, don't. You _will_ regret it.

Future versions will have the ORIGINAL "[The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)" entities added! Many thanks to the developer, [:wendigodrip:](https://modrinth.com/user/wendigodrip) for the permission! (THIS is how you do it, you don't straight up steal his assets guys (Looking at you "Something is Wrong with the Moon"😒))

## WARNING: Mod breaks with the JEI/REI mods (for some reason). Do NOT use JEI/REI with this mod.


<details>
<summary>Disclaimer:</summary>

This mod includes a crash mechanic. You can disable this in all versions after 1.1.0 BETA though. But that's boring. :P

Access the config menu with the command ```/jen config```.

![JustEnoughNull config menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89a7fcef15320c2387dcd0d7cbd93022ea15c02e_0.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Funny:</summary>

![Me and my homeboy null](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2e6c8a762806bde152efd8345a5143f1ec9f3a.png)
This dude chill asf idk what y'all got with 'em

</details>
